Create a ggsql htmlwidget

Source: R/widget.R
ggsql_widget.Rd

Create a ggsql_vega htmlwidget from a writer and spec.

Usage

ggsql_widget(writer, spec, width = NULL, height = NULL, min_width = NULL)

Arguments

writer

A Writer object created by e.g. vegalite_writer().

spec

A Spec object returned by ggsql_execute().

width, height

Optional widget dimensions passed to htmlwidgets::createWidget().

min_width

Optional minimum render width for small containers. When supplied, the widget renders at at least this width and scales down to fit narrower hosts.

Value

An htmlwidget with class ggsql_vega.

On this page
